abilities.name: Mana Spark
abilities.description: Increase mana by 5.

abilities.name: Arcane Burst
abilities.description: Deal 10 arcane damage to a single enemy.

abilities.name: Elemental Infusion
abilities.description: Choose fire, frost, or lightning; your attacks gain that element.

abilities.name: Reality Shaper
abilities.description: Once per turn, reroll a die roll of your choice.

abilities.name: Blood Tap
abilities.description: Sacrifice 2 health to gain 2 mana.

abilities.name: Crimson Strike
abilities.description: Deal 15 damage and heal for half that amount.

abilities.name: Sanguine Ward
abilities.description: Reduce incoming damage by 25% when below half health.

abilities.name: Bloodlord's Embrace
abilities.description: When you defeat an enemy, restore full health.

abilities.name: Quick Strike
abilities.description: Attack once as a bonus action.

abilities.name: Battle Shout
abilities.description: Allies within 10ft gain +2 attack until end of turn.

abilities.name: Whirlwind Attack
abilities.description: Hit all enemies adjacent to you.

abilities.name: Unstoppable
abilities.description: Once per encounter, ignore all incoming damage for one round.

abilities.name: Healing Light
abilities.description: Restore 10 health to an ally.

abilities.name: Divine Shield
abilities.description: Prevent the next 15 damage dealt to you or an ally.

abilities.name: Aura of Faith
abilities.description: Allies within 10ft gain +2 defense.

abilities.name: Resurrection
abilities.description: Revive a fallen ally at half health.

abilities.name: Sneak Attack
abilities.description: Deal double damage when attacking from stealth.

abilities.name: Smoke Bomb
abilities.description: Create a smoke cloud that obscures vision.

abilities.name: Shadow Step
abilities.description: Teleport up to 15ft to a space you can see.

abilities.name: Assassin’s Finale
abilities.description: Once per battle, instantly defeat a weakened enemy (<20% HP).
